response.justification: The candidate significantly exceeds the 6+ years requirement with nearly two decades of full-stack experience, including strong recent TypeScript/Node.js product work, React and MongoDB at Optilyz, AWS and Kubernetes exposure, and directly relevant AI-agent and MCP tooling experience at re:cinq. A deep testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, test-framework authorship) aligns well with the role's quality focus. Gaps are mostly around specific stack items — no explicit Nest.js, Vitest, or Kotlin experience — but the breadth and depth suggest fast ramp-up.
strengths: Extensive full-stack TypeScript/Node.js experience with React, MongoDB, and AWS in production
Hands-on AI-agent development and MCP tooling experience, a required and rare skill
Strong testing culture: TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks, and taught testing workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience in the primary stack
Kotlin experience absent and Java exposure appears dated and limited
Significant portion of career in niche DLang and Ember ecosystems rather than the target stack
